Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=['AccessControl','AccessControlMobileDescription','AllowExistingUntilRemoved','AppliesTo','AppliesToDocuments','AppliesToDocumentsDescription','AppliesToRooms','AppliesToRoomsDescription','AppliesToRoomsWarning','BlockAccessRecommended','DefaultLinkTypeInternal','DefaultSharingLinkType','DefaultSharingLinkTypeDescription','ExternalSharingAllowed','ExternalSharingLinks','ExternalSharingLinksDescription','ExternalSharingRestricted','LinkStopWorking','LinksBeforeRestriction']; [print\(k+': '+d.get\(k,'MISSING'\)\) for k in keys]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=[k for k in d if any\(w in k.lower\(\) for w in ['access','link','share','external','control','default','block','restrict']\)]; [print\(k,'=',d[k]\) for k in keys[:30]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=['AccessControl','AccessControlMobileDescription','AllowExistingUntilRemoved','AppliesTo','AppliesToDocuments','AppliesToDocumentsDescription','AppliesToRooms','AppliesToRoomsDescription','AppliesToRoomsWarning','BlockAccessRecommended','DefaultLinkTypeInternal','DefaultSharingLinkType','DefaultSharingLinkTypeDescription','ExternalSharingAllowed','ExternalSharingLinks','ExternalSharingLinksDescription','ExternalSharingRestricted','LinkStopWorking','LinksBeforeRestriction']; [print\(f'{k}: {json.dumps\(d.get\(k\)\)}'\) for k in keys]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:60]; [print\(f'{k}: {d[k]}'\) for k in keys]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=[k for k in d if any\(x in k for x in ['ExternalSharing','AccessControl','DefaultSharing','BlockAccess','LinkStop','LinksBeforeRestriction','AllowExisting','AppliesTo','DefaultLinkType']\)]; print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in keys}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
